records.ety: [Pref. im- in + pearl: cf. F. emperler.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Impearled (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Impearling.]

defs: To form into pearls, or into that which resembles pearls.
quotes: Dewdrops which the sun Impearls on every leaf and every flower.

defs: To decorate as with pearls or with anything resembling pearls.
quotes: The dews of the morning impearl every thorn.
